prestazioni: VQ37VHR (3.7L V6) engine: HKS GT-SS turbo kit with Garrett GT3076R turbocharger, HKS 264°/264° camshafts, Tomei 70mm titanium exhaust manifold, and AEM Infinity 7 ECU for precise fuel and ignition mapping with anti-lag and launch control
KW Suspensions Clubsport coilovers with 8-position adjustable damping, Eibach Pro-Kit lowering springs, and Cusco front strut tower bar for chassis rigidity enhancement
Nismo 4-piston front and 2-piston rear brake calipers with DBA 5000 Series slotted rotors, Motul RBF 660 brake fluid, and Project Mu G12 brake pads for high-temperature performance
estetica: Veilside Fortune 3 widebody conversion kit with custom carbon fiber front fenders, rear quarter panels, and rear diffuser for aggressive stance and aerodynamics
Seibon Carbon fiber hood with integrated NACA ducts for improved engine bay cooling and weight reduction
Work Emotion CR Kiwami 2-piece forged wheels (19x9.5 +30 front, 19x11 +35 rear) with Yokohama Advan Neova AD09 tires (255/35/19 front, 295/30/19 rear) for optimal grip and track-focused performance
